speaker: [player]
text: What would the second hymn sound like?

speaker: Vermia
text: Different. Slower. The first one is full of calling energy — come, rise, hear us. The second one would just be — here we are. We're still here. Is that enough?

speaker: Vermia
text: All normal songs are secretly hymns. That's my position.

speaker: Mawla
text: Write it. I'll help with the melody if you want.
